name: plan_with_memory
description: HTN planning augmented with holographic memory as a ReBAC tuple store. Queries stored facts to hydrate the planner's capability state, runs the planner, then stores the result for future algebraic recall.

state.description: Custom initial state (will be augmented from memory).

use_memory.description: Whether to hydrate capability state from memory. Default: true.

store_result.description: Whether to store plan result back into memory. Default: true.

memory_trust_threshold.description: Minimum trust score for memory facts used in planning. Default: 0.5.
